description_long: This chaise features a sleek, modern design with a broad, rectangular seat and a tall, straight backrest, both upholstered in smooth black material. The seat and backrest are generously padded, providing comfort and a minimalist aesthetic. The frame and legs are constructed from a warm-toned wood, with rounded edges and a visible wood grain that adds a touch of natural elegance. The rear of the chaise showcases a horizontal wooden support bar, connecting the two back legs and reinforcing the structure. The legs are straight and sturdy, slightly angled for stability, and the overall silhouette is clean and geometric. There are no visible armrests, emphasizing the open and accessible design suitable for urban parks, lobbies, or public seating areas.
description: A modern chaise with a black padded seat and backrest, supported by a warm wood frame and straight legs, without armrests. The design is minimalist and comfortable, ideal for urban environments.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wide, flat black seat and tall, straight backrest, with the wooden frame visible at the base.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thickness of the seat and backrest padding, as well as the straight wooden legs and absence of armrests.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the horizontal wooden support bar and the full width of the backrest, with the wood grain clearly visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirroring view 1, again showing the seat and backrest profile and the clean, armless design.
attribute_backrest_design: The backrest is tall, straight, and rectangular with a smooth, unsegmented surface and no visible decorative elements. It is fully upholstered in black material and appears to be well-padded for comfort.
attribute_armrest_presence: No armrests are present on either side of the chaise.
attribute_leg_style: The legs are straight, cylindrical, and made of wood with a natural finish, featuring a simple, sturdy construction and no decorative carvings or embellishments.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: The upholstery is solid black with a smooth, untextured surface and no visible patterns, tufting, or quilting.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: There are two main cushions: one large, thick seat cushion and one tall, attached backrest cushion, both seamlessly integrated into the frame with no loose or layered cushions visible.
